use_cases: Displaying rotating customer testimonials with smooth animated transitions
Social proof section for landing pages to build trust and credibility
Showcasing client quotes with avatar images and professional roles
Testimonial carousel for portfolio or agency websites
ai_summary: A minimalist testimonial carousel component featuring smooth animated transitions between customer quotes. The component displays rotating testimonials with fade, blur, and slide effects, paired with avatar images, names, and professional roles. Designed as a social proof element for landing pages, it uses a clean flat design with subtle visual polish suitable for SaaS, e-commerce, and portfolio sites.
